title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group!
